name: create_many_relation_fields
description: Create multiple relation fields between objects at once. This is the recommended way to add relations after creating objects and non-relation fields. Each item specifies the source object, target object, relation type, and labels for both sides of the relation.

relations.description: Array of relation fields to create (1-20 items).

objectMetadataId.description: ID of the source object to add the relation field to

name.description: Internal name of the relation field (camelCase)

label.description: Display label of the relation field

icon.description: Icon identifier for the relation field

targetObjectMetadataId.description: ID of the target object this relation points to

targetFieldLabel.description: Display label for the inverse relation field on the target object

targetFieldIcon.description: Icon for the inverse relation field (e.g. IconSomething)
